title: Amtech F0972 Hex Tile and Glass Drill Bit Set, Tungsten Carbide Tipped, Quick Change 3-Piece Hex Drill Bits 5mm, 6mm and 8mm
features: DURABLE: These tough, tungsten carbide tipped drill bits are designed for precision drilling of holes in tiles and glass
PRECISION DRILLING: Suitable for 6mm (1/4") hex quick-change chucks, they have a pointed-tip design to reduce break out
3 SIZES: The 3-piece set includes the following sizes: 5mm, 6mm and 8mm
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description The Amtech drill bit set is a good choice and starting point for working on bathroom type DIY projects or general wall mounting of mirrors around the home or close to sinks. Excellent for drilling ceramic tiles, glass, marble, and mirrors with precision accuracy. Fine, smooth, and burr-free finishing. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
